\##  Type of Change



Please check all that apply:

\- \[ ]  New content (resource, guide, or documentation)

\- \[ ]  Bug fix (broken link, error correction)

\- \[ ]  Content improvement (clarity, typos, restructure)

\- \[ ]  Maintenance (folder structure, template updates)

\- \[ ]  Other (describe below)



\---



\##  Contributor Checklist



Before submitting, confirm all of the following:



\- \[ ] I have read the \[CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide

\- \[ ] I have read and agree to the \[CODE\_OF\_CONDUCT.md](../CODE\_OF\_CONDUCT.md)

\- \[ ] My branch is up to date with `main`

\- \[ ] My changes are in the correct folder (`/docs` or `/resources`)

\- \[ ] File names use lowercase and hyphens (no spaces)

\- \[ ] I have not introduced any broken links

\- \[ ] My content is accurate, clear, and beginner-friendly

\- \[ ] I have added a meaningful commit message
